Global (All).title: Risk of cyberattack on critical infrastructure
Global (All).summary: Threats detected targeting major energy companies' IT systems.

Global (All).title: Growing protests in Eastern Europe
Global (All).summary: Demonstrations escalate in several capital cities over economic concerns.

Global (All).title: Tensions rise between nuclear powers
Global (All).summary: Increased military posturing and rhetoric raises global fears of conflict.

United States.title: US Senate Republicans Introduce Bill to Ban TikTok
United States.summary: US senators have introduced a bill that would ban the popular social media app TikTok from the country due to concerns over data privacy and national security.

United States.title: Gun Control Groups Sue Florida Over 'Dangerous' Stand Your Ground Law Revisions
United States.summary: Gun control groups have filed a lawsuit against Florida, alleging that recent revisions to the state's stand your ground law put civilians at risk.

United States.title: Texas Supreme Court Allows Lawsuit Against City of Austin to Proceed, Overriding Lower Court Ruling
United States.summary: The Texas Supreme Court has allowed a lawsuit against the city of Austin to proceed, overruling a lower court's ruling that the case should be dismissed.

South Korea.title: Seoul, South Korea holds emergency COVID-19 meeting due to rising Omicron cases
South Korea.summary: The Seoul city government called an emergency meeting to tackle the rising number of COVID-19 cases in the metropolitan area.

South Korea.title: South Korean stocks and currency tumble due to concerns over US recession
South Korea.summary: Concerns over a possible recession in the US have caused stocks and the currency in South Korea to plummet, with the Korean Won falling to its lowest point since 2009.

South Korea.title: Protests in South Korea over pension reform plans, thousands march in Seoul
South Korea.summary: Thousands of people took to the streets in Seoul to protest against pension reform plans that have been proposed by the South Korean government.

Japan.summary: Japan detects Omicron subvariant XBB.1.5 in travelers
Tens of thousands of residents in Tokyo ordered to evacuate due to rising flood levels
Japan to increase defense spending by 8.5% amid Russia-Ukraine war
